title: nepeta foliosa
intro: Nepeta foliosa, also known as leafy catmint, is a perennial herbaceous plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Nepeta foliosa lie in its essential oils, which contain compounds like nepetalactone, known for their antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. This plant is valued for its health benefits, including its ability to alleviate anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Traditionally, Nepeta foliosa has been used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support respiratory health and promote relaxation.
